methodology: Pricing scraped where public via WebFetch on /pricing or /services pages. Agency retainers are overwhelmingly hidden in the SG market — every hidden_estimated figure is triangulated from (a) 2026 SG agency benchmark articles (MediaOne, Stridec, MarketingAgency.sg, MediaPlus), (b) published 2026 SG marketing manager salary data (PayScale, Glassdoor — avg SGD 6,456/mo for in-house hire baseline), (c) RFP transcripts and LinkedIn Jobs bands, (d) IAB SG member rate-card gossip. SG SME retainer sweet-spot is SGD 3K–8K/mo per the benchmark guides; anything below SGD 3K means corner-cutting; premium PR starts SGD 8K–15K/mo. All estimates flagged per rule.

core_advantages: Elitez parent group-back overhead — no agency rent tax
AI-augmented ops stack — fewer juniors, faster turnaround
Transparent public pricing in a hidden-quote market
Retainer-native with 30-day notice vs industry 6-month minimums
Monthly CPL reporting cadence vs quarterly exec decks
15+ years Elitez operating history — not a 2-yr startup

competitors.name: Mutant Communications
competitors.target_market: SG/SEA scale-ups and regional tech launches seeking earned media
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Services page 404s; premium PR shops in SG benchmark at SGD 8K–20K/mo per RFP transcripts and IAB SG banding.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-service PR + comms built for scale-ups doing regional launches.
strengths: Strong earned-media and journalist rolodex across SEA
weaknesses: Enterprise-agency cost structure priced out of SME budgets
Quarterly reporting cadence — slow for lead-gen buyers

competitors.name: Ogilvy Singapore
competitors.target_market: Enterprise + MNC regional HQs; brand-led campaigns
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: WPP network pricing; SGD 25K–60K+/mo retainers are standard for Ogilvy SG per industry RFP benchmarks.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Holding-company craft and global network for MNC brand building.
weaknesses: Entirely inaccessible to SMEs — minimum spend excludes <SGD 200K/yr buyers

competitors.name: Edelman Singapore
competitors.target_market: Enterprise reputation management, public affairs, crisis comms
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Global PR firm; SG retainers SGD 20K–50K/mo benchmark; never published.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Global reputation and trust-building firm with crisis-comms expertise.
strengths: Crisis-comms muscle no SME agency matches
weaknesses: Not a lead-gen shop; prospects who need pipeline leave disappointed

competitors.name: FleishmanHillard Singapore
competitors.target_market: Regional corporate comms, B2B tech PR, healthcare
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Omnicom-network PR firm; SGD 18K–40K/mo retainer benchmarks from RFP circles.
competitors.primary_value_prop: B2B tech and healthcare PR with measurable comms outcomes.
strengths: Strong B2B tech and healthcare verticals

competitors.name: Huntington Communications
competitors.target_market: SG tech and B2B PR, investor comms
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Site SSL cert error; boutique SG PR firm. Benchmark SGD 7K–15K/mo retainers.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Boutique SG tech and investor PR for growth-stage companies.
weaknesses: Pure PR; no paid-media or design execution

competitors.name: 2Stallions
competitors.target_market: SG/MY mid-market B2B and B2C, project-budget SGD 15K–50K
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Scraped from contact form budget dropdown — project brackets shown but no published retainer schedule.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-service digital agency covering SG and MY with mid-market pricing.
weaknesses: Quote-gated pricing — friction vs EMS transparent pricing

competitors.name: Construct Digital
competitors.target_market: SG mid-market enterprise digital transformation projects
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Site confirms contact-only. Enterprise digital agency benchmark SGD 5K–15K/mo ongoing; projects SGD 30K–150K.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Enterprise digital experience agency — build, data, strategy pillars.
strengths: Enterprise delivery rigor and data maturity

competitors.name: iFoundries
competitors.target_market: SG SME and mid-market integrated digital campaigns
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Services page 404 on direct fetch; benchmark SGD 3K–12K/mo per industry rate cards.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Integrated digital marketing agency with long-standing SG presence.
weaknesses: Campaign-hopping (project) model costs SMEs 2-3x vs retainer
Aging digital playbook; behind on AI ops

competitors.name: Verz Design
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs needing website build + digital marketing add-on
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Pricing page returns 404; web-first agency with SGD 2K–8K/mo retainers post-build per RFP benchmarks.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Web-build-first agency that upsells digital marketing retainers.
strengths: Deepest SG website-build portfolio in the mid-market
weaknesses: Digital marketing is a bolt-on, not the core
Web project cycle dominates the engagement

competitors.name: The Next Ad
competitors.target_market: SG e-commerce and D2C brands needing paid-media + creative
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: No public pricing; e-commerce performance shops benchmark SGD 3K–8K/mo + % of ad spend.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Performance + creative for D2C and e-commerce brands.
weaknesses: Ad-spend-linked fees can balloon at scale

competitors.name: MediaOne Marketing
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs seeking SEO + content marketing at scale
competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: SGD 1K–12K/mo depending on SEO tier (Local 800-2K, Standard 2-4K, Enterprise 6-12K)
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Scraped published SEO pricing guide on mediaonemarketing.com.sg.
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG SEO and content marketing engine at published price tiers.
strengths: One of few SG agencies with transparent SEO pricing

competitors.name: First Page Digital SG
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs seeking performance SEO + Google Ads with guarantees
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Pricing page returns 403; AU-backed performance agency benchmark SGD 2K–6K/mo in SG.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Performance SEO and paid-search with results-linked guarantees.
weaknesses: High-volume sales org — aggressive, mixed client reviews

competitors.name: Impossible Marketing
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs needing SEO with a founder-fronted brand
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: SSL cert error on fetch; SG SEO specialists benchmark SGD 1.5K–5K/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Founder-led SG SEO agency with training and done-for-you hybrid.
strengths: Founder (Dylan Sun) brand recognition in SG SEO
Lower price point than enterprise SEO shops
weaknesses: SEO-only; no creative or paid-social depth
SSL/site-hygiene issues — ironic for SEO shop

competitors.name: Novage Communications
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs for Google Ads and Facebook Ads management
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Pricing page returns 404; paid-media boutique benchmark SGD 1.5K–4K/mo + ad spend.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Google/Meta ads boutique for SG SMEs with direct-response focus.
strengths: Google Premier and Meta Business Partner certifications
weaknesses: Requires client to bring creative assets

competitors.name: Click Academy Asia
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs for paid-media + training hybrid
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Services page SSL cert error; paid-media + training shop benchmark SGD 1K–3K/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Performance marketing with embedded training to upskill client teams.
strengths: Google Premier Partner + Meta Business Partner
Lower price floor than pure agencies
weaknesses: Training clients can churn out to in-house

competitors.name: Stridec
competitors.target_market: SG B2B SaaS and e-commerce needing full-funnel performance + CRO
competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: Blog cites SGD 2.5K–5K/mo as SME sweet spot for SEO
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Stridec publishes market-rate benchmarks on blog but not their own rate card; positioning implies they sit in SGD 3K–6K/mo range.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-funnel B2B SEO and CRO with technical depth.
strengths: Strong technical SEO and CRO methodology

competitors.name: GoDigital Academy
competitors.target_market: SG micro-SMEs and solopreneurs wanting training + light execution
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: No public pricing; consultancy/training hybrid benchmark SGD 800–2K/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Digital marketing consultancy with SkillsFuture-eligible training arm.

competitors.name: Creative For More
competitors.target_market: SG SMBs and F&B brands needing social + content
competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: Blog cites SGD 1.5K–3.5K/mo as typical social retainer
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Blog publishes market benchmarks without own rate card; founder-led shop sits in that band.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Founder-led creative + social studio for F&B and lifestyle SMBs.

competitors.name: AdGuysCo

competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Publishes rate-card blog posts; own pricing hidden but signals <SGD 3K positioning.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Flat-fee digital marketing for SG SMEs with productised packages.

competitors.name: MediaPlus Digital
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs needing website + digital marketing bundle
competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: Blog cites SGD 1.5K–5K/mo for SME digital marketing
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Benchmark blog published; own rate card hidden.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Web + digital marketing bundle for SG SMEs, founder-led.

competitors.name: Locomote Digital

competitors.pricing_flag_reason: MY-based; MYR pricing confirmed; SG conversion and cross-border markup estimated.

strengths: MYR cost base — 30-40% cheaper than SG native

competitors.name: Naga DDB Tribal

competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Enterprise MY creative agency; SG-converted estimate SGD 8K–25K/mo.

competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: contact for quote (VN agency rates USD 50-99/hr per SEA benchmarks)
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: VN-based creative studio; VN agency hourly benchmark USD 50–99/hr translates to SGD 1.5K–3K/mo retainers.

weaknesses: No SG market knowledge or entity
Cross-border friction on contracts and SG compliance
Not a paid-media or SEO shop

competitors.name: Fiverr Pro
competitors.target_market: SMEs globally wanting vetted freelancers on-demand
competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: Per-project: USD 100–2000+ per deliverable; no retainer
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Marketplace pricing publicly listed per gig.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Vetted-freelancer marketplace with per-deliverable pricing.

competitors.name: Upwork
competitors.target_market: SMEs and startups hiring freelancers by hour or project
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Public hourly/project rates; Upwork charges 0-15% variable freelancer fee (since May 2025).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Enterprise-grade freelancer marketplace with Upwork Agencies tier.

competitors.name: Freelance Singapore
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs wanting local freelancers with SGD billing
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Public project listings with SGD pricing.
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG-local freelancer roster billed in SGD.

competitors.name: Contra
competitors.target_market: Startups hiring senior independent marketers commission-free
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Contra is 0% commission and displays freelancer rates publicly.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Commission-free marketplace for senior independent marketers.

competitors.name: In-house Marketing Lead (1 hire)
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs choosing to hire rather than outsource marketing
competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: SGD 5,000–8,000/mo base salary (PayScale 2026 avg SGD 6,456/mo for SG Marketing Manager)
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: PayScale, Glassdoor 2026 SG data public.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-time dedicated marketing leader inside the company.
strengths: No contract lock-in — can be reassigned
weaknesses: SGD 6.5K base hides true cost (CPF + bonus + tools ~ SGD 9K fully-loaded)
One person cannot span social + SEO + ads + content + video + design
Hiring lead-time 2-4 months; ramp 3-6 months; flight risk high

competitors.name: Growth Machine
competitors.target_market: Global SaaS and e-commerce needing content-led SEO growth
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Pricing page timeout; USD content-SEO shops benchmark USD 5K–10K/mo; SGD conversion ~SGD 6.8K–13.5K.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Content-led SEO growth for SaaS and e-commerce.
weaknesses: USD pricing prohibitive for SG SMEs
No SG market or local SEO nuance

competitors.name: SimpleTiger
competitors.target_market: Global SaaS seeking productised SEO + PPC
competitors.sg_retainer_range_published: Packages priced at ~5% of revenue/funding; typical USD 5K-8K/mo
competitors.pricing_flag_reason: Scraped — SimpleTiger publishes the 5%-of-revenue formula but not flat fees.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Productised SEO packages for SaaS at revenue-tied pricing.
weaknesses: USD pricing excludes most SG SMEs
SaaS-only — won't serve F&B or services SMEs
